query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NULL OR contractors = 'null' OR contractors = '[]' OR contractors = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_contractors, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_array FROM projects WHERE reportId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM reports);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NULL OR contractors = 'null' OR contractors = '[]' OR contractors = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_contractors, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_array FROM projects WHERE reportId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM reports);
